session_summary:
## Lane 2 Complete: PG Migration — Schema Definition Verification

**Status**: All done — no changes were needed.

### What was verified

All 7 `.sql.ts` ↔ `.pg.sql.ts` pairs were inventoried and verified:

| .sql.ts | .pg.sql.ts | Status |
|---------|-----------|--------|
| `data-migration.sql.ts` | `data-migration.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete |
| `project/project.sql.ts` | `project/project.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete |
| `sync/event.sql.ts` | `sync/event.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete |
| `account/account.sql.ts` | `account/account.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete (incl ControlAccount with `boolean()` migration) |
| `control-plane/workspace.sql.ts` | `control-plane/workspace.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete |
| `share/share.sql.ts` | `share/share.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete |
| `session/session.sql.ts` | `session/session.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete (6 tables: Session, Message, Part, Todo, SessionMessage, Permission) |

Plus 2 PG-only files:
| File | Status |
|------|--------|
| `coordination/coordination.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete (3 tables) |
| `storage/schema.pg.sql.ts` | ✅ Complete (TimestampsPg) |

### Type conversions verified as correct
- `text({mode:"json"})` → `jsonb()` — all files
- `integer({mode:"boolean"})` → `boolean()` — account.pg.sql.ts
- All foreign keys reference correct `.pg.sql.ts` module paths
- All exports match between SQLite and PG files

### Key insight
**The .pg.sql.ts files were already complete.** No SQLite schema file lacks a Postgres counterpart. The 3% reported for PG-001 reflects production code migration status (imports from `.sql` vs `.pg.sql`, adapter switching), not schema definition status — the schema layer is at 100%.
next_steps: The remaining PG-001 work is in the application layer: migrating imports from `.sql` to `.pg.sql` in production code (session.ts, data-migration.ts, sync/index.ts, projectors.ts, etc.) and completing the adapter switching. The schema definitions are fully ready.

findings.summary: All .pg.sql.ts files confirmed complete and type-correct. No missing files, no type errors in schema definitions.
